data.name: TipOpenFile
data.value: Open one or more Conoscope images

data.name: TipExecuteFlow
data.value: Execute current flow and open result image

data.name: TipOpenCalibrationMgmt
data.value: Open calibration template management for current camera

data.name: TipRefreshCameraList
data.value: Refresh camera and calibration template list

data.name: TipCapturePhoto
data.value: Capture photo with current camera and calibration

data.name: TipReuseActiveView
data.value: When checked, flow and capture results refresh the active View, reducing memory usage

data.name: TipOpenPreprocessSettings
data.value: Open full filter and dust removal parameters

data.name: TipApplyPreprocess
data.value: Apply current preprocess preset to active view

data.name: TipSaveFocusPoiTemplate
data.value: Save current focus points to a POI template

data.name: TbCircleFitTip
data.value: Fit to the effective circular area

data.name: TipGlobalContrastReferenceSaved
data.value: Current global {0} reference: {1}. Click again to clear

data.name: TipSaveGlobalContrastReference
data.value: Save current view as global {0} reference

data.name: TipGlobalColorDifferenceReferenceSaved
data.value: Current global color diff reference: {0}. Click again to clear

data.name: TipSaveGlobalColorDifferenceReference
data.value: Save current view as global color diff reference

data.name: TipOpenCieDiagram
data.value: Open CIE chromaticity diagram of current image

data.name: TipComputeGamut
data.value: Compute gamut from recorded R/G/B data and show result window

data.name: TipRecordRData
data.value: Record R data from all focus points in active View

data.name: TipRecordGData
data.value: Record G data from all focus points in active View

data.name: TipRecordBData
data.value: Record B data from all focus points in active View

data.name: TipRecordWhiteData
data.value: Record white field data from all focus points in active View

data.name: TipRecordBlackData
data.value: Record black field data from all focus points in active View

data.name: TipComputeContrast
data.value: Compute contrast from recorded white/black data and show result window

data.name: ChkReuseActiveView
data.value: Reuse active View for flow/capture results

data.name: MsgNoActiveView
data.value: Please open or create a Conoscope view first

data.name: MsgFlowCvcieNotFoundDetail
data.value: Flow completed but no .cvcie file found in results

data.name: MsgCaptureCvcieNotFoundDetail
data.value: Capture completed but no .cvcie file found in results

data.name: MsgSelectPolarFirst
data.value: Please select a polar angle first

data.name: MsgNoFixedLightSource
data.value: Current color difference base is not a fixed light source

data.name: MsgInvalidCustomUV
data.value: Please enter valid custom u/v base coordinates

data.name: MsgMeasuredBaseNeedsSave
data.value: Measured base image requires saving the base image first for point-by-point calculation

data.name: MsgNoPixelsInCenter
data.value: No usable pixels in center 50px focus point

data.name: MsgImageSizeMismatch
data.value: Current image size does not match color diff base image, cannot compute point-by-point

data.name: MsgFocusPointNotReady
data.value: Current image is not ready for focus point calculation.

data.name: MsgDrawFocusPointsFirst
data.value: Please draw focus point circles first.

data.name: Msg3DViewNotReady
data.value: Current image is not ready for 3D view

data.name: TbEditFocusPointTip
data.value: Enter focus point tool mode when enabled...

data.name: TbCircleTip
data.value: Draw new focus point circles only

data.name: TbEditTip
data.value: Select and drag existing focus point circles

data.name: TbEraserTip
data.value: Box-select to erase focus point circles

data.name: TipEnablePreprocess
data.value: When enabled, the current preprocess preset is automatically applied when opening images.

data.name: HintFileNaming
data.value: Tip: Exported files use 'Prefix_Channel_Timestamp.csv' naming format

data.name: HintChannelPerFile
data.value: Tip: Each selected channel generates a separate file

data.name: HintBothExportModes
data.value: Tip: Both export modes can be selected simultaneously

data.name: HintAzimuthSampling
data.value: Tip: Azimuth step controls angular sampling density; radial step controls center-to-edge density

data.name: HintPolarSampling
data.value: Tip: Ring step controls ring count (radial); circular step controls sampling density per ring

data.name: HintSectionExport
data.value: Tip: Section export only exports a single cross-section at the specified angle

data.name: MsgSelectOneChannel
data.value: Please select at least one channel

data.name: MsgSelectOneExportMode
data.value: Please select at least one export mode

data.name: MsgInvalidAzimuthStep
data.value: Azimuth step must be between 0.01 and 180

data.name: MsgInvalidRadialStep
data.value: Radial sampling step must be between 0.01 and 80

data.name: MsgInvalidRingStep
data.value: Ring step must be between 0.01 and 80

data.name: MsgInvalidCircularStep
data.value: Circular angle step must be between 0.01 and 360

data.name: MsgInvalidAzimuthSection
data.value: Azimuth section angle must be between 0 and 180

data.name: MsgInvalidPolarSection
data.value: Polar section angle must be between 0 and 80

data.name: HintSamplingDescription
data.value: Azimuth mode samples from -MaxAngle to +MaxAngle; polar mode samples from 0 to 360.

data.name: HintExportTitle
data.value: When unchecked, CSV outputs column headers with units and data directly without top description rows.

data.name: MsgInvalidSamplingInterval
data.value: Sampling interval must be between 0.01 and 360

data.name: TipCurrentModelApplies
data.value: Current model parameters apply directly to the current test area overlay.

data.name: TipEnterAzimuth
data.value: Enter azimuth and press Enter to apply

data.name: TipEnterPolarAngle
data.value: Enter polar angle 0-{0} and press Enter to apply

data.name: MsgNeedRGBData
data.value: Please record or import R/G/B data first.

data.name: MsgNeedWhiteBlackData
data.value: Please record white and black data first.

data.name: MsgBaseCenter50px
data.value: Base: current image center 50px focus point average uv

data.name: MsgPolarLineCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create polar angle line: {0}

data.name: MsgLoadImageFirstColorDiff
data.value: Please load a measured image first

data.name: MsgNoFocusPointPixelsCalc
data.value: No focus point pixels available for calculation.

data.name: TestAreaWaitingForImage
data.value: Test Area: {0} mm | Waiting for image

data.name: TestAreaSizeMustBePositive
data.value: Please enter a test area size greater than 0.

data.name: FocusPointCountAndAverageContrast
data.value: {0} focus points, average contrast {1}:1, min {2}:1, max {3}:1

data.name: PleaseSelectCVCIEFile
data.value: Please select a CVCIE XYZ image file

data.name: BlackLuminanceMustBePositive
data.value: Black luminance must be greater than 0 to calculate contrast

data.name: GamutNeedsAtLeastThreeVertices
data.value: {0} gamut needs at least three vertices

data.name: FocusPointMismatchError
data.value: No matching indices between focus point groups. Please record R/G/B or white/black data under the same focus point set.

data.name: ColorDiffNeedsUVRef
data.value: Color difference channel requires uv reference

data.name: SizeMismatchFormat
data.value: {0} size does not match current image

data.name: TipOnlyShowCs200Devices
data.value: When enabled, the observation camera list shows only devices whose model contains CS200.

data.name: MsgFocusPoiTemplateSaved
data.value: Saved focus points to POI template: {0}

data.name: MsgFocusPoiTemplateSaveRequiresDatabase
data.value: Database is not connected. Cannot save the POI template.

data.name: MsgFocusPoiTemplateCreateFailed
data.value: Failed to create the POI template.

data.name: MsgFocusPoiTemplateSaveFailedCheckLog
data.value: Save failed. Check the log for details.

data.name: MsgImageViewFilePathUnavailable
data.value: The current ImageView has no associated file path.

data.name: TipRangeLimit
data.value: When enabled, display mapping is applied only inside the valid circle; otherwise the whole image is shown.

data.name: MsgInvalidDecimalPlaces
data.value: Decimal places must be an integer between 0 and 8.

data.name: MsgColorDifferenceReferenceRequired
data.value: Color difference channel requires a saved color difference reference first

data.name: MsgContrastReferenceRequired
data.value: Contrast channel requires a saved white or black reference first

data.name: MsgGlobalColorDifferenceReferenceRequired
data.value: Please save a global color difference reference image first

data.name: MsgInvalidCustomUvReference
data.value: Please enter valid custom u/v reference coordinates

data.name: MsgEmptyMeasurementDataCannotAlignFocusPoints
data.value: Some measurement data is empty; focus points cannot be aligned

data.name: MsgContrastReferenceSizeMismatchStatus
data.value: The {1} reference used by current {0} does not match the current image size.

data.name: MsgSaveContrastReferenceRequired
data.value: Please save the {0} reference image first

data.name: MsgContrastReferenceImageSizeMismatch
data.value: The {0} reference image size does not match the current image. Please save the reference again.

data.name: MsgFocusPointDisplayInfoNotFound
data.value: Display info for focus point {0} was not found.

data.name: MsgMeasurementCaptureMissingFocusPoint
data.value: Focus point {1} is missing in {0} data. Source: {2}

data.name: Conoscope_ContrastNeedsReference
data.value: Contrast channel requires saving white or black field reference first

data.name: Conoscope_NoGlobalReference
data.value: No Global Color Difference Reference Saved

data.name: Conoscope_ScaleCoefficientNotConfigured
data.value: Observation camera scale coefficient not configured
